description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, circular ear cups. The headband is covered in a light gray material adorned with a repeating black abstract pattern, giving it a stylish, urban look. The ear pads are a deep red color and appear to be made of a soft, textured material, likely synthetic leather or foam, designed for comfort during extended use. The hinges and connecting arms are black and metallic, providing structural support and adjustability. The underside of the headband is also padded for additional comfort. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for use in public or outdoor urban environments.
description: A stylish pair of over-ear headphones with a gray patterned headband and red cushioned ear pads, featuring black metallic hinges for support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded headband and both red ear cups facing forward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the patterned headband and the circular shape of the ear cups.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headband and the outer sides of the ear cups.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the ear pads' texture.
